body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ritual** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**Prefrontal Inter-brain Synchronization Reflects Convergence and Divergence of Flow Dynamics in Collaborative Learning: A Pilot Study.**. Front Neuroergon.. PMID: 38235236. DOI: 10.3389/fnrgo.2021.686596. Flow is ahighly motivated and affectively positive state in which aperson is deeply engaged in an activity and feeling enjoyment from it. In collaborative activities, it would be optimal if all participants were in astate of flow. However, flow states fluctuate amongst individuals due to differences in the dynamics of motivation and cognition.
